title: U.S. retail sales increase again, but higher gas prices and inflation played a big role
summary: U.S. retail sales rose for the third consecutive month in April, but gains were primarily driven by higher gas prices rather than discretionary spending growth, with inflation-adjusted spending remaining subdued.
content: Sales at retailers rose in April for the third month in a row, but the increase stemmed in large part from drivers spending more on gasoline because of higher prices. Spending was on the softer side after adjusting for inflation.

zh.title: 美国零售销售再次增长，但汽油价格上涨和通货膨胀发挥了重要作用
zh.summary: 美国零售销售在四月份连续第三个月增长，但增长主要由汽油价格上涨而非自由裁量支出增长推动，通胀调整后的支出仍然不温不火。

title: Versant stock jumps 10% after company's Q1 report shows bright spots in licensing, platforms
summary: Versant, the recently spun-out Comcast portfolio of TV networks, reported its first quarter results as an independent company with positive performance in its licensing and platforms business segments.
content: Versant, the portfolio of TV networks spun out from Comcast, reported earnings for its first quarter as an independent company.

zh.title: Versant股价上涨10%，Q1报告显示许可和平台业务的亮点
zh.summary: 最近从康卡斯特剥离的电视网络组合Versant公布了作为独立公司的首个季度业绩，其许可和平台业务部门表现良好。

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Netflix, Broadcom, Starbucks, Amazon, Disney & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued notable recommendations and price targets for major technology and consumer stocks on Thursday, including Nvidia, Apple, Netflix, and other large-cap names.
content: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周四最大分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、Netflix、博通、星巴克、亚马逊、迪士尼等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师在周四对主要科技和消费类股票发布了重要推荐和目标价格，包括英伟达、苹果、Netflix和其他大型公司股票。

title: The Dow is poised to retake 50,000 as Cisco jumps, Boeing gains: Live updates
summary: Technology sector strength drove the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to new record highs on Wednesday, potentially positioning the Dow to reclaim the 50,000 level.
content: A rally in the technology sector drove the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to new intraday and closing records on Wednesday.

zh.title: 道琼斯指数有望重新突破5万点，思科上涨，波音涨幅扩大：实时更新
zh.summary: 科技板块的强势表现推动标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数在周三创下新高，有望使道琼斯指数重新夺回5万点。

title: Bond markets brace as UK PM Starmer's political rivals break cover, heath sec. Streeting resigns
summary: UK bond markets faced uncertainty as Health Secretary Streeting resigned and Prime Minister Starmer's colleagues signaled potential leadership challenges, with multiple bids expected.
content: The prime minister's colleagues could be ready to mutiny, with leadership bids potentially being announced Thursday.

zh.title: 债券市场紧张，英国首相斯塔默的政治对手浮出水面，卫生大臣斯特里廷辞职
zh.summary: 随着卫生大臣斯特里廷辞职，首相斯塔默的同僚暗示可能的领导权挑战，英国债券市场面临不确定性，预计会出现多个候选人竞争。

title: Xi tells Musk, Tim Cook and other CEOs on Trump's trip: China will 'open wider'
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping told visiting U.S. business executives including Elon Musk, Jensen Huang, and Tim Cook that China will increase market openness, signaling potential trade and investment opportunities.
content: Tesla and Space X boss Elon Musk, Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang and Apple CEO Tim Cook were part of Trump's delegation.

zh.title: 习近平告诉马斯克、蒂姆·库克及其他随川普访华的首席执行官：中国将"更加开放"
zh.summary: 中国领导人习近平告诉访华的美国商业高管（包括埃隆·马斯克、黄仁勋和蒂姆·库克），中国将增加市场开放度，预示着潜在的贸易和投资机会。

title: Wealthy donors stand to win double tax benefit if 'Trump Accounts' allow stock donations
summary: Proposed "Trump Accounts" could allow wealthy donors to contribute appreciated stocks without triggering capital gains taxes, creating significant tax advantages for high-net-worth individuals.
content: Permitting stock contributions to "Trump Accounts" would allow donors to offload appreciated shares without paying capital gains tax.

zh.title: 如果"特朗普账户"允许股票捐赠，富有捐赠者将获得双重税收优惠
zh.summary: 提议的"特朗普账户"可能允许富有捐赠者贡献升值股票而无需触发资本利得税，为高净值个人创造重大税收优惠。

title: Student loan forgiveness paths have changed under Trump. How to navigate them
summary: Trump administration changes to the Department of Education's income-driven repayment plans will alter timelines for borrower debt cancellation, requiring borrowers to understand new forgiveness pathways.
content: Changes to the U.S. Department of Education's income-driven repayment plans will impact many student loan borrowers' timelines to debt cancellation.

zh.title: 特朗普任期内学生贷款豁免途径已改变。如何应对
zh.summary: 特朗普政府对教育部收入驱动还款计划的改变将改变借款人债务取消的时间表，要求借款人了解新的豁免途径。

title: Should you ever resign by text? Trump's FDA shake-up raises the question
summary: FDA Commissioner Dr. Marty Makary resigned via text message during Trump's recent FDA leadership overhaul, raising questions about resignation protocols in government agencies.
content: Dr. Marty Makary resigned as FDA commissioner on Tuesday. A White House official confirmed to CNBC that Makary's resignation came via text.

zh.title: 你应该通过短信辞职吗？特朗普的FDA改组引发了这个问题
zh.summary: FDA专员Marty Makary博士在特朗普最近的FDA领导层改组期间通过短信辞职，引发了关于政府机构辞职协议的问题。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Versant, Biogen, Bullish, Cisco and more
summary: Several stocks including Versant, Biogen, Bullish, and Cisco posted significant premarket price movements on the trading day.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

zh.summary: 包括Versant、百健、Bullish和思科在内的多只股票在交易日盘前出现了显著的价格波动。

title: U.S., EU lawmakers pledge European scrutiny of Paramount's WBD deal
summary: U.S. and European lawmakers warned that Paramount's acquisition of Warner Brothers Discovery would reduce competition in the media industry, calling for regulatory scrutiny of the transaction.
content: The lawmakers, in a letter reported first by CNBC, told Paramount CEO David Ellison that the Warner Brothers Discovery acquisition would stifle competition.

zh.title: 美欧议员承诺对派拉蒙的WBD交易进行欧洲监督
zh.summary: 美国和欧洲议员警告称，派拉蒙对华纳兄弟探索公司的收购将减少媒体行业的竞争，要求对该交易进行监管审查。

title: Starbucks has ripped higher this year. TD Cowen sees more room to run
summary: Starbucks shares have surged significantly in 2026, and analyst TD Cowen projects the stock has additional upside potential based on the company's strategic operational shift.
content: Starbucks' strategy shift will drive the stock even higher from where it trades now, according to TD Cowen.

zh.title: 星巴克今年股价大幅上涨，TD Cowen认为仍有上升空间
zh.summary: 星巴克股价在2026年大幅飙升，分析师TD Cowen基于公司战略运营转变预计该股仍有更多上升潜力。

title: What the biggest mid-cycle earnings acceleration on record means for the stock market
summary: A trader reflects on missing the stock market's significant surge from late March, analyzing what record mid-cycle earnings acceleration signals about future market direction.
content: A trader looks back to figure out why he missed the stock-market surge from late March.

zh.title: 创纪录的中期盈利加速对股市意味着什么
zh.summary: 一位交易员反思错过了3月下旬以来股市的大幅上涨，分析创纪录的中期盈利加速对未来市场走向的信号意义。

title: The commodities guru who warned about silver falling now, is saying the hantavirus could do the same to oil
summary: A former hedge-fund executive and commodities strategist who previously predicted silver declines is now warning that a potential hantavirus outbreak could create a black-swan event depressing oil prices.
content: What if the Hantavirus turns into a black-swan for oil? This former hedge-fund executive is taking out some insurance against that.

zh.title: 曾警告白银下跌的商品大师现在说汉坦病毒可能对石油造成同样影响
zh.summary: 一位曾预测白银下跌的前对冲基金高管和商品策略师现在警告，潜在的汉坦病毒爆发可能造成黑天鹅事件，压低油价。

title: Nvidia moves one step closer to a breakthrough on Chinese exports after reaching another milestone
summary: CEO Jensen Huang's ongoing efforts to secure permission for Nvidia to export advanced semiconductors to China appear to have advanced despite opposition from both U.S. and Chinese governments.
content: Nvidia’s chief executive Jensen Huang has been lobbying for a long time for the ability to export advanced semiconductor chips to China in the face of opposition from both Washington and Beijing. It appears a breakthrough might have been made.

zh.title: 英伟达在实现另一个里程碑后，向中国芯片出口突破迈近一步
zh.summary: 首席执行官黄仁勋持续争取英伟达向中国出口先进芯片许可权的努力似乎取得进展，尽管面临美国和中国政府的反对。

title: U.S. clears H200 chip sales to 10 China firms as Nvidia CEO looks for breakthrough
summary: The U.S. has cleared sales of Nvidia's H200 chips to 10 Chinese firms, marking a potential shift in technology export restrictions. Before the curbs, Nvidia controlled approximately 95% of China's advanced chip market, making this approval a significant development in U.S.-China tech relations.
content: Before U.S. export curbs tightened, Nvidia commanded about 95% of China's advanced chip market.

zh.title: 美国批准向10家中国公司销售H200芯片，英伟达首席执行官寻求突破
zh.summary: 美国已批准向10家中国公司销售英伟达的H200芯片，标志着科技出口限制政策的潜在转变。在实施限制措施之前，英伟达控制了中国先进芯片市场的约95%，这项批准标志着中美技术关系的重大发展。

title: UK economy grew 0.6% between January and March
summary: The UK economy grew 0.6% in the first quarter of 2026, according to the Office for National Statistics. This represents an acceleration in economic growth compared to prior periods.
content: The Office for National Statistics says growth picked up in the first three months of the year.

zh.title: 英国经济在1月至3月期间增长0.6%
zh.summary: 根据英国国家统计局，英国经济在2026年第一季度增长0.6%。这代表与之前时期相比经济增长加速。

title: European markets to open higher as politics dominates the news agenda
summary: European stocks are expected to open higher Thursday as investors monitor political developments in the UK and U.S. President Trump's summit with China. Market sentiment reflects investor focus on major geopolitical events.
content: European stocks are expected to open higher Thursday as investors keep an eye on developments in the U.K. and U.S. President Donald Trump's trip to China.

zh.title: 欧洲市场上涨开盘，政治主导新闻议程
zh.summary: 欧洲股票预计周四高开，因为投资者正在关注英国的政治发展和美国总统特朗普与中国的峰会。市场情绪反映了投资者对主要地缘政治事件的关注。

title: Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid 'Thucydides Trap' at high-stakes summit
summary: U.S. President Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing for a high-stakes summit addressing the "Thucydides Trap"—the risk of conflict when a rising power challenges an established one. The meetings began Thursday and continue through Friday.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.

zh.title: 习近平问特朗普美国和中国能否避免"修昔底德陷阱"
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普与中国主席习近平在北京举行高层峰会，讨论"修昔底德陷阱"——即新兴大国挑战既有大国时可能发生冲突的风险。会议从周四开始，持续到周五。

title: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
summary: The UK's tax authority has awarded Quantexa, a British financial data platform, a £175 million contract to deploy AI for detecting fraud and tax compliance errors. The initiative aims to improve tax collection and reduce evasion.
content: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.

zh.title: 英国税务部门将使用英国科技公司的AI来检测欺诈和报税错误
zh.summary: 英国税务部门向英国金融数据平台公司Quantexa颁发了1.75亿英镑的合同，用于部署AI来检测欺诈和税务合规错误。这一举措旨在改善税收征收并减少逃税现象。

title: Cuba has run out of diesel and oil, energy minister says
summary: Cuba's energy minister reported severe fuel shortages as a U.S.-led oil blockade creates an "extremely tense" energy crisis. The shortage has triggered widespread power outages across the island nation.
content: The minister says the situation in Cuba is "extremely tense", as a US-led blockade of oil to the country causes widespread power cuts.

zh.title: 古巴能源部长称古巴已耗尽柴油和油料
zh.summary: 古巴能源部长报告称由于美国主导的石油封锁造成的燃料严重短缺，导致"极其紧张"的能源危机。短缺已引发整个岛国范围内的大规模停电。

title: Oil rises as IEA flags greater volatility ahead, OPEC cuts demand forecast
summary: Oil prices are rising as the International Energy Agency warns of heightened market volatility ahead. OPEC has lowered its 2026 global demand growth forecast to approximately 1.2 million barrels per day.
content: OPEC cut its demand growth estimates for 2026 to about 1.2 million barrels per day.

zh.title: 油价上涨，国际能源署警告市场波动加剧，欧佩克下调需求预期
zh.summary: 随着国际能源署警告市场波动加剧，油价正在上涨。欧佩克已将其2026年全球需求增长预期下调至约每天120万桶。

title: Australian giant Coles misled shoppers with fake discounts, court rules
summary: Australia's Coles supermarket chain was found to have misled shoppers through false discount practices in a court ruling. The decision comes as a similar case progresses against competitor Woolworths, with potentially significant financial penalties.
content: The decision, which comes amid similar case against Woolworths, could mean significant penalties.

zh.title: 澳大利亚零售巨头科尔斯欺骗消费者虚假折扣，法院裁定
zh.summary: 澳大利亚超市连锁店科尔斯因虚假折扣做法欺骗消费者而被法院判决。该裁决之际，针对竞争对手沃尔沃斯的类似案件正在进行中，可能面临巨大财务处罚。

title: 20 stocks in the S&P 500 of companies with soaring sales and improving profit margins
summary: Earnings season standouts include AI hardware manufacturers alongside unexpected winners, with 20 S&P 500 stocks showing strong sales growth and expanding profit margins.
content: This earnings season’s big winners include makers of AI-oriented hardware, but the list also includes some surprises.

zh.title: 标普500指数中销售额飙升且利润率不断改善的20支股票
zh.summary: 财报季的佼佼者包括人工智能硬件制造商和一些意想不到的赢家，其中20支标普500指数股票显示出强劲的销售增长和利润率扩张。

title: Cerebras prices IPO above expected range, as Wall Street braces for AI tsunami
summary: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO priced above the expected range, signaling investor appetite for AI infrastructure as Wall Street prepares for larger AI deals later this year.
content: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO, and with the chipmaker's offering, investors are gearing up for some even bigger AI deals later this year.

zh.title: Cerebras首次公开募股定价高于预期范围，华尔街为人工智能海啸做准备
zh.summary: Cerebras在其首次公开募股中筹集了55.5亿美元，定价高于预期范围，表明投资者对人工智能基础设施的需求，华尔街为今年晚些时候的更大人工智能交易做准备。

title: In photos: Trump lands in China ahead of high-stakes summit with Xi
summary: Trump lands in China for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping covering contested issues including trade, technology, Taiwan, and the Iran conflict.
content: The high-stakes summit is expected to cover a wide range of contentious topics, including trade, technology, export controls, Taiwan, and the Iran war.

zh.title: 图片：特朗普抵达中国，为与习近平举行高风险峰会做准备

title: Inside India newsletter: Trump-Xi meeting could test India’s positioning as China counterweight
summary: The Trump-Xi summit may challenge India's decade-long positioning as a U.S. geopolitical counterweight to China in the Indo-Pacific region. The meeting's outcome could reshape regional strategic alignments and India's role.
content: For more than two decades, consecutive U.S. administrations have seen India as a counterbalance to China's growing influence in the Indo-Pacific.

zh.title: 印度通讯：特朗普-习会晤可能考验印度作为中国制衡力量的定位
zh.summary: 特朗普-习会晤可能挑战印度十年来作为美国对华地缘政治制衡力量在印太地区的定位。此次会晤的结果可能重塑地区战略格局和印度的角色。

title: Asia-Pacific stocks trade mixed as Trump lands in Beijing for high-stakes Xi meeting
summary: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed as Trump arrived in Beijing for talks with Xi Jinping on trade, tariffs, and technology restrictions.
content: Asia markets traded mixed ahead of closely watched Trump-Xi summit on trade, tariffs and technology restrictions.

zh.title: 特朗普抵达北京与习近平进行高风险会谈，亚太股市涨跌互现
zh.summary: 随着特朗普抵达北京与习近平就贸易、关税和技术限制进行谈判，亚太市场涨跌互现。

title: Cisco to cut jobs so it can invest more in AI, and the stock rockets toward a record
summary: Cisco announced job cuts to fund AI expansion, driving the stock to record levels as investors respond to the company's strong earnings and AI-focused strategy.
content: Cisco’s stock soars into record territory, after the networking giant announced plans to invest more in AI and upbeat earnings report.

zh.title: 思科裁员以增加人工智能投资，股价飙升至历史新高
zh.summary: 思科宣布裁员以资助人工智能扩张，投资者对公司强劲的财务业绩和专注人工智能的战略做出积极回应，推动股价升至历史新高。
